title: The Bishops of Rome and of Alexandria under the Same Emperor.

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

verses.text: In the third year of the same reign, Alexander, bishop of Rome, died after holding office ten years.
About the same time Primus, bishop of Alexandria, died in the twelfth year of his episcopate, and was succeeded by Justus.
